reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: The JSON output contains a note about omitted sections and the reading order indices show a massive gap between page 3 and page 13. Pages 4 through 12 (covering NCDIT's role, efforts, legal authority, and definitions) and pages 52 through 53 (containing appendix data like maps and demographic charts) are completely missing from the conversion.
concerns.output_quote: The sections array jumps from the end of page 3 (element 21) to the start of page 13 (element 127), and ends at page 51 (element 522) before jumping to page 54 (element 544).
concerns.location: Throughout document, specifically jumps between pp 3-13 and pp 51-54

concerns.analysis: The large statistical table on page 54 (JSON section 54) has corrupted structure. Row 1 has 3 cells (Language, COGRs, Avg. Rank), Row 2 contains 16 letter headers (A-R), and Row 3+ contains 18 data cells (Language name, 16 region values, Avg. Rank). Row 2 is missing the first and last cells, which causes the letter headers to misalign with the data columns in a grid view. This is a major structural corruption of a complex table.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Table on page 54 with columns: Language, A, B, C, D, E, F, G, J, K, L, M, N, O, P, Q, R, Avg Rank.
concerns.output_quote: Section 54 table: Row 2 contains 16 cells starting with 'A' and ending with 'R', missing alignment cells for the 'Language' and 'Avg. Rank' columns present in other rows.

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
